description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. The check_code job runs in the default test stage, uses the coala/base Docker image, and executes pip3 install -r requirements.txt then coala-ci. The run_tests job also runs in the test stage, uses the python:3.5 Docker image, runs pip3 install -r requirements.txt, pip3 install -r test-requirements.txt, and finally runs py.test. Neither job defines caches, artifacts, or special rules.
